verdict: The chart has decent rhythmic synchronization but suffers from excessive jump repetition and jarring difficulty spikes unsuitable for a Medium difficulty.

issues.problem: Incredibly repetitive use of JUMP LR. Almost every jump in these sections is Left-Right, which lacks physical variety and makes the gameplay feel monotonous.

Jarring difficulty spikes with 8th-note jumps embedded directly into 8th-note streams (e.g., U -> JUMP LR -> U). This requires high-level bracket/double-tap speed that is inappropriate for a Medium chart.
A sudden 16th-note burst (U -> D -> L) at 140 BPM that introduces an awkward double-step or slide movement, disrupting the flow of the song's climax.
